zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Bernak I於1373年出生在英國諾福爾可薩可林加姆時，他的父親William Bernacke43歲，母親Lady Mary De Engaine38歲。他於大約1400年與Lady Anna Noone在英國英格蘭諾福爾可薩可林加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1409年8月31日在英國諾福爾可謝爾方享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Bernak I于1373年出生在英国諾福爾可薩可林加姆时，他的父亲William Bernacke43岁，母亲Lady Mary De Engaine38岁。他于大约1400年与Lady Anna Noone在英国英格兰諾福爾可薩可林加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1409年8月31日在英国諾福爾可謝爾方享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bernak
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Egon, Kurt, Otto.
Polish (mainly Bernaś) and Czech (Bernáš): from a derivative of the personal name Bernard .
German and French: from a derivative of an ancient Germanic personal name formed with ber(n) ‘bear’, e.g. Bernhard .

variants.name: Bernard
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Emile, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Andre, Lucien, Normand, Henri, Michel, Cecile, Gabrielle.

English, Scottish, French, Walloon, Breton, Dutch, German, Polish, Czech, Slovenian, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and African (mainly Tanzania): from the personal name Bernard, from an ancient Germanic name, composed of the elements ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘brave, hardy, strong’ (see Bernhard ). It was borne by several Christian saints, including Saint Bernard of Menthon (923–1008), founder of Alpine hospices and patron saint of mountaineers, whose cult accounts for the frequency of the name in Alpine regions. The popularity of the personal name was also greatly increased by virtue of its having been borne by Saint Bernard of Clairvaux (c. 1090–1153), founder and abbot of the Cistercian monastery at Clairvaux. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Bernardo . Bernard is the second most frequent surname in France. Compare Barnard , Benore , and Burnor .

History: The first documented bearer of this name in Canada was from the Lorraine region of France. He is recorded in Quebec City, QC, in 1666 as Jean Bernard. He and some of his descendants were dit Anse or Hanse, presumably because his original forename was Hans (German equivalent of French Jean). — The Bernard families of LA have origins in France, Acadia, the West Indies, and Germany. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of South Carolina.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Bernak I was born in 1373, in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England, his father, William Bernacke, was 43 and his mother, Lady Mary De Engaine, was 38. He married Lady Anna Noone about 1400, in Saxlingham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 31 August 1409, in Shelfanger, Norfolk, England, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Bernak I est né en 1373, à Saxlingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William Bernacke, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary De Engaine, avait 38 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anna Noone environ 1400, à Saxlingham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 31 août 1409, à Shelfanger, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 36 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Bernak I(이)가 1373년 영국 노르폴크 사스링함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Bernacke(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary De Engaine(은)는 38세였다. 그는 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 사스링함에서 Lady Anna Noone(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1409년 8월 31일 영국 노르폴크 셸파그거에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Anna Noone aproximadamente 1400, em Saxlingham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Bernak I родился в 1373 г. в местности сакслингхам, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени William Bernacke было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary De Engaine, 38. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anna Noone около 1400 г. в местности сакслингхам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 31 августа 1409 г. в местности шелфангир, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 36 лет.
